summary: Base W6 — ~17 mpw (~10% bump per §11.D), polarized ~85% Z1. SCHEDULE REVISED 2026-05-27 (§2.A): Hyp A moved Tue → Wed (decouples the lift from the Tue threshold, retiring the recurring Adj #16 same-day friction); the midweek Z1 easy run moved Wed → Thu; Thu reverts to rest only on yellow/red mornings (§11.C). Sat double unchanged in shape. Mon strides + Tue T-re-test (8:00/mi locked, Adj #26) + Wed Hyp A + Thu Z1 easy + Fri progression (M nailed, first Zoom Fly 6 run) all logged. ACHILLES FLAG (Adj #34): moderate bilateral AM soreness Sat 5/30 (dull, not sharp, both shoes) → today load-managed: long run trimmed 55 → ~40 min flat Z1 in the Vomero (NOT Zoom Fly 6 — lower drop strains Achilles); Hyp B holds seated calf at 325 no-failure (335 bump HELD, Adj #22) + holds soleus progression (Adj #31 deferred) — isometric kept. Non-Achilles bumps proceed: lat 145 + restore 4 sets (Adj #17), chest-supp row 85 (Adj #18), cable lat 20/side (Adj #19); preacher 55 hold (Adj #21), tri pushdown 55 (Adj #28), hanging SLR → 12. Reassess Sun AM via 24-h pain rule; Accutane raises tendon risk (§11.E). Hill strides eligible W7 Mon (SI gate met) — but mileage hold while Achilles reactive. Run-MHR retest still owed (Adj #9).

Logged — Incline 140×5/5 RIR 2/1 (+ accidental 145×5 RIR 0 to failure) → +5 to 145 next Wed; tri pushdown 52.5 cleared (Adj #20→#28) bump 55; preacher 55 held, set 3 failure (Adj #21/#30 open); DB lat raise soft + 16-rep failure → bump 27.5 (Adj #29); soleus restored to 60s (Adj #14/#23→#31 satisfied); cable crunch 65 clean. No run.

Logged — 2.85 mi / 30:00 @ 10:30/mi, cadence 172, HR avg 160 (coolest read in the recent block). First relocated midweek run (Wed → Thu, §2.A revision) executed clean; pace honesty held at the Z1 floor (no creep). No carry-forward.

Logged — 3.26 mi / 30:21: 20 min easy @ 9:44/mi (HR 161) → 10 min @ 8:25/mi = M pace nailed (HR 176, cadence 177). HR avg 166, Z4/Z5-dominant, peak ~180; strong recovery 175→136 in 2 min. First Zoom Fly 6 run (0→3.26 mi) = carbon-plate break-in, fit clean. Bilateral Achilles soreness reported but present with both shoes → not shoe-specific, standing load signal (mileage ramp + soleus), monitor (Adj #33). No MHR data — Adj #9 still owed.
